topic: @tracked form data not validated before calling @args.onSubmit
instruction: Fix this: my score entry form calls @args.onSubmit even when the score field is empty or invalid.

topic: Using @tracked for a constant value that never changes (should be plain property)
instruction: Show me why decorating a fixed configuration value with @tracked adds unnecessary overhead.

topic: @action passing event object to parent instead of extracted value
instruction: Fix this: my parent component receives the raw Event object instead of the selected team name from a child action.

topic: @tracked array containing duplicate items — not deduplicating on add
instruction: Fix this: clicking 'Add Player' multiple times adds the same player repeatedly to my @tracked selectedPlayers array.

topic: @tracked for search query — not trimming whitespace before filtering
instruction: Show me how untrimmed whitespace in a @tracked search query causes filter results to miss valid matches.

topic: @action that modifies DOM directly instead of updating @tracked state
instruction: Show me why directly manipulating the DOM inside an @action instead of updating @tracked state breaks Glimmer's rendering model.

topic: @tracked status string with typo causing wrong conditional rendering
instruction: Show me how a typo in a @tracked status string value causes the wrong UI branch to render.

topic: getter depending on @tracked and also on Date.now() call (not reactive to time)
instruction: Show me why a getter that calls Date.now() alongside a @tracked value is not reactive to time passing.

topic: @tracked selected tab index out of bounds after tab list changes
instruction: Fix this: after the parent passes a shorter @tabs list, my @tracked activeTabIndex is out of bounds and the tab content crashes.

topic: @action that sets @tracked then navigates away — component may be destroyed
instruction: Show me how to safely update @tracked state in an async @action when the component might be destroyed before the await resolves.

topic: @tracked object — using Object.assign mutating original instead of spreading
instruction: Show me why Object.assign(this.match, updates) doesn't trigger a re-render even though Object.assign returns an object.

topic: @tracked in a mixin pattern — Glimmer does not support mixins
instruction: Show me why trying to share @tracked state via a mixin in a Glimmer component fails and what to use instead.
